title: Meet Chelsie Anderson: American woman who accidentally became a Mexican drug cartel queen
summary_full: Chelsie Anderson went from serving tables to becoming a pivotal figure in drug trafficking. After her marriage fell apart, she linked up with a global cartel and quickly escalated within their ranks, overseeing substantial drug shipments each week. Eventually, she emerged as a key leader in an international drug ring, underscoring the intricate web of criminal operations and the people involved.
